## Description
<!-- What does this change do? Which module: app/ or platform/? -->

## Module
- [ ] `app/` — Web Application (React frontend)
- [ ] `platform/` — ML Platform (Python, RL, MuJoCo)
- [ ] Both
- [ ] Infrastructure / docs only

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] UI/UX improvement
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Deployment / DevOps

## Checklist
- [ ] `git pull origin main` before starting
- [ ] Frontend: `npm run build` passes (if app/ changed)
- [ ] Frontend: `npm run typecheck` passes (if app/ changed)
- [ ] Platform: tests pass (if platform/ changed)
- [ ] Commit messages follow format: `scope/Component: description`
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or credentials
- [ ] No mixed app/ + platform/ changes (unless related)
